title: Sort Colors
hints: Notice that the array can be partitioned into three contiguous sections for 0s, 1s, and 2s. How can you maintain these boundaries while scanning?
Use three pointers to track the boundaries of the 0, 1, and 2 regions. This is known as the Dutch National Flag algorithm.
Maintain invariants where elements before the low pointer are 0s, after the high pointer are 2s, and between them are 1s or unsorted items.
